verdicts.note: His sheriff formation and public-safety priority support an enforcement lean, but the commissioner dossier contains no specific enforcement mechanism supporting maximal -2.

review_notes: All three scores were reviewed. Buermann and Strutner correctly remain unscored. Mullen also has no scores, but his candidate record is incorrectly marked withdrawn=false: the dossier explicitly instructs downstream scoring to mark him withdrawn because he suspended campaigning after the formal withdrawal deadline while remaining ballot-listed [S2].
